timing_boundary: The inspected commit is roughly two days after arXiv v1 and is not treated as the exact paper-time implementation.
inspection_scope: three public example task packets and runs
test_observation: With package-local PYTHONPATH values, 6 evaluation and 5 sandbox tests passed. Construction ran 13 tests: 12 passed and one dry-run semantic-rubric test failed because evidence preparation could not complete in this environment. pytest was not installed. This is release inspection evidence, not reproduction of paper results.
